name: aggregator skips dotfiles (files starting with .)
setup:
cat > tree/google/g.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: Google
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/g
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:g
rules:
  - id: g-rule
    name: g
    description: g rule.
    detector: rubric/detectors/g.sh
recommended_set: [g-rule]
all_set: [g-rule]
EOF

cat > tree/google/.hidden.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: hidden
  authoritative_publisher: hidden
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/h
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:h
rules:
  - id: hidden-rule
    name: h
    description: should not appear.
    detector: rubric/detectors/h.sh
recommended_set: [hidden-rule]
all_set: [hidden-rule]
EOF
